synopsis:
Issue 3 of 4 from Marvel Comics Inquisitors Mini Series
DESTROY THE JEDI!
Reeling from the death of his master, TENSU RUN commits himself to building a future for the JEDI! DARTH VADER tasks the SEVENTH and NINTH SISTERS to draw Jedi TENSU RUN out of hiding and engage in one of the strangest battles ever seen!
title: Inquisitors #3
